title: Climate Evidence: From Australia's Power System to Global Temperature Records
summary: Australian electricity, surface-temperature, satellite and atmospheric records form one evidence chain for why the energy transition matters.
key_takeaway: The strength of climate evidence lies in independent measurement systems arriving at compatible conclusions across different time scales.

inline_figures.caption: Cape Grim measurements make the long-run atmospheric CO? rise visible while preserving the normal seasonal cycle.
The NSW fuel mix shows why the energy transition is a system-design challenge, not only a capacity-building challenge.
